STORIES FROM ANANDALOK

Every Person Here
Has a Story That
Will Change How You
See the World.

These are not case studies. They are real stories about residents who call Anandalok home, the families who trusted us, and the staff who chose this work because nothing else felt meaningful enough.

Featured Story
Resident Journeys

Rushadru Found His Stage

From non-verbal and isolated to the boy who leaps on stage the moment music plays. A story of transformation.

4 min readRead Full Story

Who Will Love Her When We Are Gone?

Every parent of a child with autism faces this question. One family shares their journey from despair to hope.

Life at Anandalok

A Day at Anandalok — From Morning Assembly to Starlight

What does an ordinary day look like for our 35 residents? Follow along from the first cup of chai to the last goodnight.

Understanding Autism

Autism Is Not Mental Illness. Here Is What Every Indian Family Needs to Know.

The single biggest misconception about autism in India — and why it costs families years of lost opportunity.

5 min read
Read Story
Resident Journeys

The Garden That Grew a Gardener

How one resident found his purpose in the soil. Name changed to Sumon to protect privacy.

4 min read

Life at Anandalok

Two Brothers, One Dream — The Founding Story of Anandalok

In 1989, Kashinath needed a home. His brother Ashok decided to build one — not just for him, but for everyone.

Get New Stories in Your Inbox

We share a new story every month — resident journeys, campus updates, and insights about autism care. No spam. Just stories that matter.

Every Story Here Is Proof That the Right Home Changes Everything.

If these stories moved you, imagine what your support could do for the next story — the ones we are waiting to write.

Anandalok

A residential care sanctuary for individuals with autism and intellectual disabilities. Empowering lives and nurturing potential since 1989.

80G Tax Exempt
FCRA Approved
